questions.photoDescription: A train platform with many people waiting. A train has just pulled into the station and the doors are opening. Some passengers are preparing to board.

options.A: The train is moving away from the platform.
options.B: Passengers are waiting to board the train.
options.D: A worker is repairing the train tracks.

questions.explanation: The train doors are opening and passengers are preparing to board, indicating they are waiting to get on.

questions.photoDescription: A man in a uniform is pushing a cart loaded with luggage through a hotel lobby. A reception desk is visible in the background with a staff member standing behind it.

options.A: The man is checking in at the reception desk.
options.B: The hotel lobby is under construction.
options.C: A staff member is helping a guest with luggage.
options.D: The luggage cart is being loaded onto a vehicle.

questions.explanation: The uniformed man pushing the luggage cart is a hotel staff member assisting with guest luggage.

audioSegments.text: Look at the picture marked number 1 in your test book.
(A) The train is moving away from the platform.
(B) Passengers are waiting to board the train.
(D) A worker is repairing the train tracks.
Look at the picture marked number 2 in your test book.
(A) The man is checking in at the reception desk.
(B) The hotel lobby is under construction.
(C) A staff member is helping a guest with luggage.
(D) The luggage cart is being loaded onto a vehicle.
